portal.metaDescription: Daniel Chen is a software engineer building trading-grade systems and a property agent for rentals & leasing in Malaysia, with the same obsession for getting the details right either way.
portal.name: Daniel Chen
portal.intro: I build software that survives real traffic, and I help people find a place that feels like home. Pick a side.

engineer.label: Software Engineer
engineer.headline: Trading-grade systems
engineer.desc: Platform & full-stack engineering, payments, reliability, and trading infrastructure.

property.label: Property Agent
property.headline: A place that feels like home
property.desc: Honest, unhurried rental guidance for tenants and owners across the Klang Valley.

home.name: Daniel Chen

hero.cfiDesc: A global trading firm, bringing platform reliability and payments engineering to live markets.
hero.panelTitle: Building systems that survive real traffic, real failures, and real business rules.
hero.supportingText: Most of my work sits where business-critical backend logic meets platform engineering: payment flows, reliability, security, cloud operations, and systems that need to behave correctly under pressure.

proof.roles: roles across platform and product engineering

focusItems.payments: Payment gateways, reconciliation flows, and transactional correctness
focusItems.platforms: Platform architecture, observability, and cloud operations
focusItems.interfaces: Interfaces that explain technical work clearly instead of decorating it

home.title: Platform Engineer
home.tagline: Building production infrastructure, cloud security systems, and payment integrations
home.description: Platform Engineer specializing in Kubernetes, cloud-native architectures, and security-first development. Helping companies build scalable, reliable systems that handle real-world complexity. Experience in enterprise payment systems, cloud infrastructure, and game operations platforms.
home.featuredSubtitle: Selected work across payments, platforms, and full-stack product delivery.
home.featuredHint: Start here for the fastest read on the systems I build.
home.skillsSubtitle: Tools, languages, and infrastructure I actually use to ship.
home.skillsHint: Supporting context, not the main pitch.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: I build production systems that stay reliable when the stakes are real.
about.description: Platform Engineer with expertise in building enterprise-grade payment systems, cloud infrastructure, and scalable applications. Passionate about security, performance, and developer experience.
about.introBody: My work sits where backend engineering, infrastructure, and product delivery overlap. I care about resilient architecture, clean operational behavior, and shipping systems that still make sense six months later.
about.capabilitiesTitle: The areas I keep returning to across products, platforms, and teams.
about.approachTitle: I prefer systems thinking over surface polish.
about.timelineTitle: A track record across payments, platforms, and high-traffic production work.

stats.roles: Roles across product and platform engineering

systems.title: Design for the whole system
systems.body: I am usually thinking past the feature itself: contracts, failure modes, operational visibility, and how the next engineer will extend the system without fighting it.

reliability.title: Reliability is part of the feature
reliability.body: Payments, infra, and internal platforms only work when edge cases are handled deliberately. I prioritize correctness, observability, and safe operational behavior from the start.

delivery.title: Ship with urgency, not chaos
delivery.body: I move quickly, but I do not treat speed as an excuse for unclear architecture. The goal is delivery that stays maintainable after launch, not demo-quality momentum.

expertise.payments: Build enterprise payment systems with Type Approval and APIP compliance
expertise.microservices: Design secure microservices with JWT, HMAC-SHA256, and AES-256-GCM encryption
expertise.kubernetes: Deploy and maintain production Kubernetes clusters with 99.9% uptime
expertise.databases: Optimize SQL queries achieving up to 95% performance improvements
expertise.infrastructure: Architect cloud-native solutions on AWS and Tencent Cloud
expertise.frontend: Develop modern web applications with Next.js, React, and TypeScript

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A showcase of my work including payment systems, e-commerce platforms, and enterprise applications.
projects.headline: Production work, platform systems, and side projects that were built to hold up.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to discuss opportunities? I'd love to hear from you!
contact.headline: If the work is technically serious, I’m interested.
contact.notAvailableForWork: Currently employed, but open to interesting projects

footer.builtBySelf: Proudly designed and built from scratch by me

property.metaDescription: Daniel Chen, a rental & leasing property agent for the Klang Valley. Honest, unhurried help finding a place that feels like home, for tenants and owners.

hero.headline: Find a place that feels like home.
hero.sub: Honest, unhurried rental guidance for tenants and owners across the Klang Valley. No pressure, no jargon, just the right place at the right price.

tenants.title: For tenants
tenants.body: Tell me your budget, area, and move-in date. I shortlist real options that fit, and I'm honest when something doesn't.

owners.title: For owners
owners.body: List your unit for lease with proper photos, fair pricing, and tenant screening, so you get reliable tenants, faster.

viewing.title: Viewings & coordination
viewing.body: I arrange and join viewings around your schedule, and handle the back-and-forth so you don't have to.

support.title: Lease & move-in support
support.body: From tenancy agreement to deposit and handover, I keep the paperwork clear and the process smooth.

featured.title: A few places I'd love to show you.

process.title: Four simple steps to your next home.

step1.title: Tell me what you need
step1.body: Budget, area, size, move-in date, and the feel you're after.

step2.title: I shortlist
step2.body: You get a curated list of real, available units, no spam, no time-wasters.

step3.title: We view
step3.body: We see the best options together, in person or online.

step4.title: You move in
step4.body: I help with the agreement, deposit, and handover, end to end.

about.title: A builder by trade, an agent who actually listens.
about.body: I'm Daniel, a software engineer who also helps people rent and lease across the Klang Valley. Same obsession with getting the details right: clear communication, honest advice, and following through. I work in English, Mandarin, and Bahasa Malaysia.

listingsPage.title: Rentals
listingsPage.headline: Available rentals across the Klang Valley.
listingsPage.desc: A sample of the kinds of units I help with. Tell me what you're looking for and I'll send options that match.
listingsPage.empty: New listings are on the way, send me what you need and I'll get you a shortlist.

contactPage.headline: Let's find your next place.
contactPage.desc: Tell me your budget, preferred area, and move-in date. The fastest way to reach me is WhatsApp.
